title: Presidio Visitor Center | ​​Presidio National Park | The Presidio (San Francisco)
content: Interior of the Presidio Visitor Center, with people viewing a large Presidio model. # Presidio Visitor Center. Located on the Main Post next to Presidio Transit Center and Presidio Tunnel Tops, Presidio Visitor Center offers interactive exhibits, maps, and quality gifts, gear, and mementos. ## Daily Park Overview at the Visitor Center. Explore the Presidio and all there is to do in the Golden Gate National Recreation Area. Group of visitors listening to the daily park overview in the Visitor Center"). Gather around the campfire and join National Park Service rangers for free talks at Presidio Tunnel Tops’ Campfire Circle near the Presidio Visitor daily at 3 p.m. Learn about the park and its history with gorgeous views of the Golden Gate Bridge as your backdrop. Presidio Visitor Center is nestled between Presidio Transit Center and the Main Parade Lawn, overlooking Presidio Tunnel Tops and the Golden Gate Bridge. Presidio Visitor Center exterior, with the Golden Gate Bridge in the background.
